items.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
items.raw_content: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event kicked off this morning at 10 a.m. PT at Apple Park, starting a week full of expected announcements around Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more, along with developer events and demos. This year’s event is particularly notable for a couple things. It marks CEO Tim Cook’s last with the company, […]

items.title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
items.raw_content: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.
items.summary: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.

items.title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
items.raw_content: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.
items.summary: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.

items.title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
items.raw_content: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.
items.summary: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.

items.title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
items.raw_content: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.
items.summary: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.

items.title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature
items.raw_content: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.
items.summary: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.

items.title: Apple’s long-awaited AI Siri overhaul is finally here
items.raw_content: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.
items.summary: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.

items.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
items.raw_content: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.
items.summary: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

items.title: Meta made its own AI-generated clickbait news feed
items.raw_content: Facebook has long been filled with feeds of clickbait articles. Now, Meta is making its own clickbait articles with AI. items.title: New York lawmakers pass one-year ban on new data centers
items.raw_content: The New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on new large data centers, the first statewide ban of its kind if Democratic Governor Kathy Hochul signs it into law. Lawmakers behind the bill say it's meant to give policymakers time to understand the impact of large data centers on the environment and energy prices. […]

items.title: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
items.raw_content: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve the size of his planned 40,000-acre data center in Utah amid mounting pressure from residents and activists, as reported earlier by local affiliate ABC4.
